flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arkansas Tech University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5k → 5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arkansas Tech University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Arkansas Tech University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (62.8% → 74.1%).
